span.p: per milestone M1..Mn — SEQUENTIAL (each fully done before the next; VERIFY-2 writes src/**)

span.p:
W0 · Classify
Designer — classify-game
physics-first archetype
+ core loop + scope-cut

div.style: color: rgb(11, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
W1 · Spec
Designer — write-gdd
slim GDD (incl. failModel)
+ 3–5 milestones,
each with runtime assertions
(the design THESIS)

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
VERIFY-1 · Design
Design Critic — verify-design
STATIC, pre-code: judge + HARDEN
→ frozen winnable blueprint
(rubric · kinematic feasibility ·
threat-on-path · declaredRanges)

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
W2 · Scaffold
Coder — scaffold
copy template → empty green
build + expose __GAME__ hook

div.style: color: rgb(88, 28, 135) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
W3 · Assets
Artist — assets
fill asset slots
(placeholder-first)

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
W4 · Execute
Executor — implement-milestone
build the blueprint VERBATIM
(zero design latitude);
populate __GAME__ for real

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
VERIFY-2 · QA
Playtester — verify
impl fidelity, NOT gameness:
fidelity · completability ·
invariants · ISOMORPHIC PERTURBATION

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: W4 HALT: blueprint underspecified → status: failed
